payload.message: MONEYSHARKS AUTONOMOUS CYCLE. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/autonomous_runner.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/config.example.json`. Parse the JSON output. If ok=false and status=circuit_breaker or halted, announce an alert. If ok=true, log silently (no announcement unless there are execution errors). report the summary.

MONEYSHARKS REVIEW CYCLE. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/fetch_trade_outcomes.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/trades.json`. Then run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/review_trades.py < /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/trades.json`. Summarize win rate, avg PnL, loss streaks, and any lessons applied. No announcement unless win_rate < 40% or max_loss_streak >= 3.

MONEYSHARKS DAILY SUMMARY. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/status.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/config.example.json`. Then run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/review_trades.py < /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/trades.json`. Generate a concise daily trading summary: total trades, win rate, total PnL, today's PnL, best/worst trades, symbols traded, leverage range, any circuit breaker or halt events, and lessons learned today. Announce this summary.

MONEYSHARKS HEALTH CHECK. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/status.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/config.example.json --json`. Parse the output. If halt=true OR circuit_breaker=true OR consecutive_errors >= 3, announce an urgent alert immediately with the error details. If daily_loss >= 80% of max_daily_loss, warn the user. Otherwise confirm healthy (no announcement needed).

MONEYSHARKS PAPER SCAN. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/autonomous_runner.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/config.example.json`. Config is in paper mode — no real orders. Log the scan decisions silently.

MONEYSHARKS PAPER REVIEW. Run: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/fetch_trade_outcomes.py /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/trades.json --paper`. Then: `python3 /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/scripts/review_trades.py < /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/moneysharks/trades.json`. Summarize paper trading performance.
